title: GHOST's Vanilla Enhanced
description:
Enhances Vanilla Minecraft
Style: Vanilla+ / Quality of Life / Performance
body:
# 🌿 Enhance Vanilla Minecraft

## Style: Vanilla+ / Quality of Life / Performance

Description:
Enhance Vanilla Minecraft is designed for players who love the original Minecraft experience but wish it had just a bit more polish, depth, and life. This modpack stays true to the classic vanilla feel, while adding carefully chosen mods that improve visuals, performance, and gameplay quality — without breaking immersion or overcomplicating things.

## ✨ Features:

Smoother performance and optimizations for a lag-free experience

Subtle visual upgrades: improved lighting, animations, and environments

QoL enhancements like better UI, minimaps, and inventory management

100% multiplayer friendly and perfect for long-term worlds

Whether you’re a builder, explorer, or survivalist, Enhance Vanilla Minecraft makes the game feel fresh yet familiar — just how Minecraft should be.
